# James Learning KB — agent discovery index

> Canonical repo for querying James's learning corpus (Pinecone + Neo4j). Broad research defaults to full-corpus `query_all`; use the agentic router when graph-vs-vector routing matters.
> **Repos:** `KeyFlo-ai/knowledge-base` (org) · `James-Server-Admin/keyflo-learning-kb` (external mirror)

## Start here

- [docs/COLE-SETUP.md](docs/COLE-SETUP.md): **Cole handoff** — clone, bearer token, query CLI, troubleshooting
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): **Primary instructions for LLMs** — routing decision table, tools, boundaries
- [README.md](README.md): Human-oriented overview

## Routing (which database when)

- [docs/routing.md](docs/routing.md): vector vs graph vs both — decision table and examples
- [router/agentic_router.py](router/agentic_router.py): Agentic router source (`route_query()`)
- [docs/agentic-router.md](docs/agentic-router.md): How to run the router on the Keyflo server
- [docs/public-api.md](docs/public-api.md): **HTTP API** — bearer auth, default full-corpus query, Cole without SSH

## HTTP API (preferred for Cole)

- Base URL: `https://kb-api.keyflo.ai`
- [docs/public-api.md](docs/public-api.md): `POST /v1/query`, bearer tokens, `all_namespaces=true` by default
- `scripts/query_api.py`: Local CLI — set `LEARNING_KB_API_TOKEN`, no SSH
- `config/cole.env.example`: Local env template (copy to `config/cole.env`, gitignored)
- `api/app.py`: FastAPI gateway (server-side)

## Store access

- [docs/pinecone.md](docs/pinecone.md): Pinecone index `learning` — namespaces, keys, `scripts/query_db.py`
- [docs/neo4j.md](docs/neo4j.md): Neo4j `learning-kg-neo4j` — bolt 7689, `scripts/query_graph.py`

## Scripts (read-only CLIs)

- `scripts/query_api.py`: **HTTP API client** (Cole default — no SSH)
- `scripts/query_db.py`: Pinecone semantic search (server)
- `scripts/query_graph.py`: Neo4j coverage / disputes / lane topics (server)
- `scripts/route_query.py`: Agentic router launcher (server)

## GitHub Actions

- `.github/workflows/smoke-api.yml`: Public `/health` check (no secrets)
- `.github/workflows/smoke-query.yml`: Server-side query smoke (needs `keyflo-server` runner + secrets)

## Related (outside this repo)

- [okrealai/langchain-course](https://github.com/okrealai/langchain-course): Full router runtime + ingest + graph build
- [KeyFlo-ai/keyflo-marketing](https://github.com/KeyFlo-ai/keyflo-marketing): `kg_ground()` pipeline GraphRAG for ad copy/creative lanes
